title: Easy Froglight Obtaining
description: Get froglights by feeding frogs magma cream items instead of magma cube mobs.
body:
Feed the different frog types magma cream and they will drop their corresponding froglight type. Here are how to obtain each froglight:
- Feed a **temperate frog** magma cream to obtain an **ochre froglight.**
- Feed a **warm frog** magma cream to obtain an **pearlescent froglight.**
- Feed a **cold frog** magma cream to obtain an **verdant froglight.**

Here is a showcase of how the datapack/mod works:

![A gif showcasing how the datapack/mod works.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uNJxCnXm/images/aa0dec4b96ee522b313aa8aa4c081a08e3dab03b.gif)

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/easy-froglight-obtaining/)
